rules.css_selector: t-h1 t-h2 t-h3 t-body t-math t-math--inline c-card--glass t-math c-code-block c-callout c-callout c-callout--important c-callout c-callout--warning c-card--glass c-interactive-canvas c-slider u-animate-draw u-animate-glow l-section l-container

Apply .t-math to MathJax/KaTeX output containers for consistent JetBrains Mono styling. Use .c-card--glass for high-level summaries or 'Key Theorems'. Wrap the entire document in .l-container for centered readability.
